home.title: Free Online Tools
home.subtitle: {count} free tools for designers, developers and everyone. No signup required.
home.suggestTool: More tools coming soon · Suggest a tool at

favicon.title: Favicon Generator
favicon.desc: Create favicon icons from text, emoji or image upload.

og-image.title: OG Image Generator
og-image.desc: Design Open Graph images (1200×630) for social sharing.

css-gradient.title: CSS Gradient Generator
css-gradient.desc: Build beautiful CSS gradients visually. Copy ready-to-use code.

color-palette.title: Color Palette Extractor
color-palette.desc: Upload any image and extract its dominant color palette.

image-compressor.title: Image Compressor
image-compressor.desc: Reduce image size without losing quality. PNG, JPG, WebP.

image-to-pdf.title: Images to PDF
image-to-pdf.desc: Convert multiple images into a single PDF. Drag to reorder.

pdf-to-word.title: PDF to Word
pdf-to-word.desc: Convert PDF files to editable Word (.docx) documents.

pdf-to-excel.title: PDF to Excel
pdf-to-excel.desc: Extract tables and data from PDF into Excel (.xlsx).

invoice.title: Invoice Generator
invoice.desc: Create professional invoices and download as PDF.

json-formatter.title: JSON Formatter
json-formatter.desc: Format, validate and minify JSON instantly.

base64.title: Base64 Encoder/Decoder
base64.desc: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 to text.

jwt-decoder.title: JWT Decoder
jwt-decoder.desc: Decode and inspect JWT token header, payload and expiry.

regex-tester.title: Regex Tester
regex-tester.desc: Test regular expressions with live match highlighting.

cron-builder.title: Cron Builder
cron-builder.desc: Build cron expressions visually with plain English explanation.

number-base.title: Number Base Converter
number-base.desc: Convert between Binary, Decimal, Hex and Octal.

timestamp.title: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.desc: Convert Unix timestamps to dates and back instantly.

word-counter.title: Word Counter
word-counter.desc: Count words, characters, sentences and reading time.

text-case.title: Text Case Converter
text-case.desc: Convert between camelCase, snake_case, UPPER, Title and more.

lorem-ipsum.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
lorem-ipsum.desc: Generate placeholder text for designs and mockups.

markdown-preview.title: Markdown Preview
markdown-preview.desc: Write Markdown, see live HTML preview side by side.

qr-code.title: QR Code Generator
qr-code.desc: Generate QR codes for URLs, text, WiFi. Download PNG.

unit-converter.title: Unit Converter
unit-converter.desc: Convert length, weight, temperature, speed and more.

password-generator.title: Password Generator
password-generator.desc: Generate strong secure passwords. Multiple at once.

email-signature.title: Email Signature
email-signature.desc: Create HTML email signatures for Gmail and Outlook.

vcard.title: vCard Generator
vcard.desc: Create digital business cards with QR code. Download .vcf.
